title: Agent Bricks Knowledge Assistant and Supervisor Agent are now available in additional regions
body:
[Knowledge Assistant](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/knowledge-assistant) and [Supervisor Agent](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/multi-agent-supervisor) are now available in the `ap-south-1` (Mumbai) AWS region. [Cross-geo processing](/aws/en/resources/databricks-geos#cross-geo-processing) must be enabled for this region.

For the full list of supported regions, see [Features with limited regional availability](/aws/en/resources/feature-region-support).
